nasb.text: He said, “Take them alive.” So they took them alive and killed them at the pit of Beth-eked, forty-two men; and he left none of them.

esv.text: He said, “Take them alive.” And they took them alive and slaughtered them at the pit of Beth-eked, forty-two persons, and he spared none of them.

cnv.text: 他說：“活捉他們！”他的手下就活捉了他們，在伯艾吉的坑邊殺了他們；一共是四十二個人，沒有留下一人。

ccb.text: 耶户下令活捉他们，他的手下便捉住他们，在剪羊毛处的井旁全部杀掉，共四十二人，一个不留。
